calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John A. Mangini for Elizabeth A. Adler.

The Court inquires as to whether Mr. Mangini had seen a copy of the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Mangini replied that he had not seen the notes. He addressed the issue of the excessive fees and informed the court that more work had been performed. The matter was then taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Sajja Ravinantapricha. Probate Examiner: C. Nahnsen. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Aug-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Waiver Of Requirement Of Filing Declaration Under P.C.S. 13100 In Certain Situations
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Elizabeth Adler (Administrator).

Mr. Mangini stated that there were 195 heirs, that 33 had passsed, that 18 13100 declarations had been filed and requested a waiver for those heirs that were to receive less than $900.00. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2000 Granted Per Written Order
